title: Australian Roast Beef with Roasted Vegetables
description: A classic Australian-inspired roast beef dish with tender roast vegetables.

ingredients.name: Australian beef roast
ingredients.notes: choose a 1.5 kg beef roast for a family dinner

instructions: Season the beef roast with salt and pepper.
Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large oven-safe pan over high heat.
Sear the beef roast on all sides until browned, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer the pan to the preheated oven and roast for 20 minutes per kilogram, or until the internal temperature reaches 60°C (140°F) for medium-rare.
While the beef is roasting, toss the carrots, potatoes, and onion with the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil, salt, and pepper on a baking sheet.
Roast the vegetables in the oven for 20-25 minutes, or until tender and lightly browned.
Remove the beef from the oven and let it rest for 10-15 minutes before slicing.
Serve the sliced beef with the roasted vegetables and garnish with fresh rosemary leaves.
